sn56.30:1.1: On one occasion a larger number of elder monks were staying among the Cetiyas at Sahajani [Sahajati].
sn56.30:1.2: And on that occasion a large number of elder monks, after the meal, on returning from their alms round, were sitting gathered together in a pavilion when this discussion arose:
sn56.30:1.3: “Is it the case that whoever sees stress also sees the origination of stress, the cessation of stress, & the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress?”
sn56.30:2.1: When this was said, Ven. Gavampati the Elder said,
sn56.30:2.2: “Face to face with the Blessed One did I hear this, friends, face to face did I receive it:
sn56.30:2.3: ‘Monks, whoever sees stress also sees the origination of stress, the cessation of stress, & the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress.
sn56.30:2.4: “‘Whoever sees the origination of stress also sees stress, the cessation of stress, & the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress.
sn56.30:2.5: “‘Whoever sees the cessation of stress also sees stress, the origination of stress, & the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress.
sn56.30:2.6: “‘Whoever sees the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress also sees stress, the origination of stress, & the cessation of stress.’”
